items.title: Count students per department
items.question_text: Which SQL query correctly counts the number of students in each department?

options.A: SELECT department, COUNT(*) FROM students GROUP BY department
options.C: SELECT department FROM students GROUP BY count(*)
options.D: SELECT count(*) FROM students GROUP BY name

items.title: List students with advisor names
items.question_text: How do you correctly join the 'students' table with the 'advisors' table to list student names alongside their advisor names?

options.A: SELECT s.name, a.name FROM students s JOIN advisors a ON s.id = a.id
options.B: SELECT s.name, a.name FROM students s JOIN advisors a ON s.advisor_id = a.id
options.C: SELECT s.name, a.name FROM students s, advisors a
options.D: SELECT name FROM students JOIN advisors
